channel.title: AI Press Review — Social Feed (EN+FR)
channel.description: Merged bilingual feed for LinkedIn distribution. Each item carries LinkedIn-ready copy — short summary, listen link, hashtags.

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Resets Open-Source Pricing, DOJ Backs xAI in Colorado, and AI Costs Outpace Headcount
item.description:
DeepSeek V4 Resets Open-Source Pricing, DOJ Backs xAI in Colorado, and AI Costs Outpace Headcount
Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions.
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-26.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Drops, OpenAI Doubles Down, and the Programmer Job Market Cracks
item.description:
DeepSeek V4 Drops, OpenAI Doubles Down, and the Programmer Job Market Cracks
Synthetic in voice, genuine in substance. Now presented by an AI clone of your devoted host. And yes, the accent is... how you say... more French than the man himself. The algorithm had opinions.

#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: SpaceX bids $60B for Cursor, Google's dual TPU launch — Apr 23
item.description:
SpaceX bids $60B for Cursor, Google's dual TPU launch — Apr 23
SpaceX preempted a $2 billion Cursor fundraise with a $10 billion collaboration fee and a path to a $60 billion acquisition, marking the most aggressive AI coding bet by a non-software company to…
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-23.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: SpaceX bids $60B for Cursor, OpenAI goes enterprise — Apr 22
item.description:
SpaceX bids $60B for Cursor, OpenAI goes enterprise — Apr 22
SpaceX secured an option to acquire AI coding startup Cursor for up to 60 billion dollars, while OpenAI launched Codex Labs with consulting partners including Accenture and PwC, targeting enterprise…
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-22.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: Anthropic's $100B compute bet: Amazon doubles down — Apr 21
item.description:
Anthropic's $100B compute bet: Amazon doubles down — Apr 21
Anthropic committed more than $100 billion over the next decade to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute from Amazon, with Amazon investing $5 billion immediately and optioning up to $20 billion more.
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-21.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: Amazon-Anthropic $100B pact: infrastructure war escalates — Apr 21
item.description:
Amazon-Anthropic $100B pact: infrastructure war escalates — Apr 21
Anthropic committed to spend over $100 billion on Amazon infrastructure over the next decade, deepening a hardware-first partnership that locks in cloud compute at a scale no European or Asian rival…
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-21.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: Anthropic-White House Détente, Data Center Crunch, and the Cerebras IPO
item.description:
Anthropic-White House Détente, Data Center Crunch, and the Cerebras IPO
Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei met with White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles on Friday to resolve a Pentagon dispute over the Mythos model, while the EU simultaneously pressed Anthropic on…
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-19.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: Factory hits $1.5B: AI coding's breakout moment — Apr 17
item.description:
Factory hits $1.5B: AI coding's breakout moment — Apr 17
Factory raises $150 million at a $1.5 billion valuation for AI coding tools. OpenAI launches a pharma-focused model while expanding ChatGPT ads.
Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-17.html Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: OpenAI acquiert Hiro Finance : la finance IA en mouvement — 16 avr
item.description:
Nouvelle étape : AI Press Review en français, avec ma voix clonée. Vos retours m'intéressent.
OpenAI acquiert Hiro Finance : la finance IA en mouvement — 16 avr
OpenAI renforce sa présence dans la finance avec l'acquisition de Hiro Finance, tandis que Lightelligence prépare son IPO en Chine, signalant une accélération dans les puces photoniques.
Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr/episodes/2026-04-16.html Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net
#IntelligenceArtificielle #Podcast #IA

item.title: Puces IA : la Chine proche du 2nm face aux USA — 15 avr
item.description:
Nouvelle étape : AI Press Review en français, avec ma voix clonée. Vos retours m'intéressent.
Puces IA : la Chine proche du 2nm face aux USA — 15 avr
La Chine se rapproche de la production de puces IA en 2nm via la start-up Dishan Technology. Greg Brockman d'OpenAI prédit une transformation de la productivité des équipes grâce à l'IA, tandis que…
Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr/episodes/2026-04-15.html Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net
#IntelligenceArtificielle #Podcast #IA

item.title: Agents IA : Le déploiement s'accélère, la performance suit ? — 15 avr
item.description:
Nouvelle étape : AI Press Review en français, avec ma voix clonée. Vos retours m'intéressent.
Agents IA : Le déploiement s'accélère, la performance suit ? — 15 avr
Google DeepMind spécialise son IA pour les robots du monde réel avec Gemini Robotics 1.6, tandis qu'OpenAI poursuit ses acquisitions dans la finance.
Écouter (FR) — https://podcast.aequitus.net/fr/episodes/2026-04-15.html Listen (EN) — https://podcast.aequitus.net
#IntelligenceArtificielle #Podcast #IA
